selections.name: Keyser Soze
selections.reason: Draws the absolute sweet spot in post 5. Shows strong back class and tactical speed that plays perfectly on this 7/8 mile oval.

selections.name: Copper Teen
selections.reason: Another prime draw in post 4. Closed well for 2nd in last start, showing the exact kind of stretch kick needed here.

selections.name: Bro Hug
selections.reason: Rail draw can be tricky with the long stretch, but has enough gate speed to secure a pocket trip and use the passing lane.

selections.name: Shipwrecked
selections.reason: Forgive the last start where he was parked out. Inside draw today offers a massive rebound opportunity.

danger_horse.name: Dm Bigcatbodie
danger_horse.reason: Outside post is tough, but drops slightly in class and has the late speed to swoop if the pace melts down.

selections.name: Literally Rockin

selections.name: Lucky Lisa G

selections.name: Gaga
selections.reason: Solid qualifying efforts. Inside draw allows for an economical trip to save energy for the long Hoosier stretch.

selections.name: Seek Perfection

danger_horse.name: Cedarwood Show

selections.name: Helponeanother
